description: The ~7-day disc golf drive from Kansas City to the Detroit area for Worlds (spectating). Aug 17-25, 2026, in a camper. Stops are top courses in travel order; edit and re-run build_route.py to reroute.

stops.name: Kansas City, MO
stops.notes: Leg origin — wake up in KC, drive east

stops.name: Championship Course at Eagles Crossing
stops.notes: New Truxton, MO · World #9 / US #4 / MO #1 · play both courses here (also Wild Times, MO #3)

stops.name: BC3 Disc Golf Course
stops.notes: Nashville, IN · World #92 / US #64 / IN #1 · long drive across IL/IN

stops.name: Lake Michigan camp — Valparaiso / Crown Point, IN
stops.notes: 2 nights by Lake Michigan (camper). Play Rogers Lakewood Park (IN #4, on a lake) and/or Lemon Lake County Park (IN #8). Indiana Dunes NP nearby for camping/beach.

stops.name: Arvesta Sport Complex
stops.notes: South Haven, MI · World #78 / US #52 / MI #4 · up the lakeshore

stops.name: Kensington Toboggan
stops.notes: Milford Twp, MI · World #63 / US #40 / MI #2 · Worlds venue area — spectate 8/26-8/30
